BBC NewsBBC News - News Front Page https://www.bbc.co.uk/news https://news.bbcimg.co.uk/nol/shared/img/bbc_news_120x60.gif英国广播公司新闻https://www.bbc.co.uk/news节点的 RSS 2026 年 3 月 6 日星期五 05:08:55 GMT Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.en-gb 15
PM stands by decision not to join strikes on Iran and sends more jets to QatarThe PM said the best way forward was a "negotiated settlement with Iran where they give up their nuclear ambitions". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdr2214nmk8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdr2214nmk8o#1 Thu, 05 Mar 2026 19:01:46 GMT
First UK government flight from Middle East lands at Stansted AirportThe plane was due to leave Oman on Wednesday but remained grounded due to problems getting passengers on board. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy4wwd2jlypo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy4wwd2jlypo#1 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 01:30:06 GMT
'This is war': BBC speaks to Iranians at borderIranians fleeing their country have told the BBC what life under bombardment has been like. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/czx4r6zq7wxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/czx4r6zq7wxo#1 Thu, 05 Mar 2026 18:36:37 GMT
Iran's high-risk war strategy seems to centre on endurance and deterrenceTehran's approach appears to rest on a belief it can absorb strikes longer than its adversaries sustain pain and costs, writes BBC Persian's Amir Azimi. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93jj3gz8x0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93jj3gz8x0o#1 Thu, 05 Mar 2026 18:40:22 GMT
'I'm still haunted that he died alone': The last voices of the Covid inquiryBereaved families have the final say as the Covid inquiry completes four years of public hearings. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93wxxe9410o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93wxxe9410o#2 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 04:52:33 GMT
Sheep are disappearing from the UK's hills - and its dinner platesHave we have passed "peak sheep" in the UK? https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgrzd72wp5zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgrzd72wp5zo#2 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 04:22:00 GMT
US and Venezuela agree to resume diplomatic ties after Maduro captureThe US said the two sides would make joint efforts to promote stability after the US seized Maduro and his wife. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy9g1l5jx90o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy9g1l5jx90o#2 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 04:23:12 GMT
Travelodge staff gave sex attacker key to woman's room, then offered £30 refundThe woman, who woke to find Kyran Smith sexually assaulting her, branded a £30 reward offer "insulting". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3v77w5d437o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3v77w5d437o#2 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 03:42:22 GMT
'Who's better, him or Pele?': Trump meets Messi at White HouseLionel Messi, owner Jorge Mas, and members of the Inter Miami team visited the White House to celebrate last year's Major League Soccer Cup victory. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/crrx1wdr27wo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/crrx1wdr27wo#2 Thu, 05 Mar 2026 22:55:06 GMT
Labour MP 'voluntarily suspends herself' after husband arrested in China spy probeJoani Reid said she had temporarily stood down from the party after her husband was arrested on suspicion of spying for China. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg8edz1ng2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg8edz1ng2o#2 Thu, 05 Mar 2026 20:35:22 GMT
TfL hack in 2024 affected around 10 million people, BBC can revealTfL insists it has "kept customers informed throughout this incident and will continue to take all necessary action". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz0ggkr2g77o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz0ggkr2g77o#2 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 00:05:12 GMT
